# Teaching

<br>

I teach across undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in economics, environmental policy, and quantitative methods.

Having supervised more than 10 PhD candidates to completion—largely in discrete choice modelling—I welcome applications from prospective doctoral students. If your research interests align with discrete choice modelling, non-market valuation, or applied econometrics, please get in touch with a brief outline of your research proposals.

## Undergraduate courses

- Environmental Economics.
- Introduction to Quantitative Techniques for Economics.
- Introductory Statistics.
- Agricultural and Food Marketing.

## Postgraduate courses

- Environmental Economics.
- Environmental Valuation and Methods.
- Statistics.
- Survey Methods and Analysis.
- Sustainable Business and Policy Analysis in Practice.
- Business and Policy Evaluation.
- Energy Management.
- Economics of Climate Change.
- Risk Management in Banking.
